reviews.comment:
No es recomendable cargar combustible aqui. En Verano (Enero / Febrero / Marzo) solamente cobran en Efectivo y suelen quedarse sin Combustible. Puedes quedar parado uno o dos dias. Respecto a los surtidores, dudo mucho que estén verificados y certificados. En enero 2019 tuve que cargar solamente "Super" (porque no tenian Infinia), pagar "solamente" en Efectivo y el llenado del tanque (venia de Comodoro) no fue tal.... Saquen sus propias conslusiones.

(Translated by Google)
It's not recommended to fill up here. In the summer (January/February/March) they only accept cash and often run out of fuel. You could be stranded for a day or two. As for the pumps, I highly doubt they're verified and certified. In January 2019, I had to fill up with only "Super" (because they didn't have Infinia), pay "only" in cash, and the tank wasn't even filled (I was coming from Comodoro). Draw your own conclusions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeF9YemhRRRAB
